responsibilities: Design and implement closed-loop control systems for industrial automation, robotics, or motion control applications.
Develop and tune PID and advanced control algorithms to optimize system response, stability, and disturbance rejection.
Model system dynamics using state-space representations and validate control strategies through MATLAB/Simulink simulation.
Program and configure PLCs and industrial controllers to automate manufacturing processes and equipment sequencing.
Integrate sensors, actuators, and feedback devices into control loops to achieve precise, real-time system performance.
Conduct system identification and frequency response analysis to characterize plant dynamics for controller design.
Collaborate with mechanical and electrical teams to define control architecture for new automation and robotics systems.
Commission and troubleshoot control systems on the factory floor, resolving stability, latency, and noise-related issues.
Develop HMI and SCADA interfaces to monitor and control industrial processes in real time.
Document control system architecture, control loop parameters, and validation test results for design and safety reviews.
